name: World Border
desc: Updates the world border (center, size, warning distance/buffer, damping).

implementation.overview: S44 updates world border settings. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S44PacketWorldBorder)
modules.purpose: Server sends S44PacketWorldBorder to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
